kubejs.ponder.arc_furnace.text_1: controller always needs to be in the middle of two ports
kubejs.ponder.arc_furnace.text_2: the two ports adjacent to the controller can be either item input or output
kubejs.ponder.arc_furnace.text_3: the power port needs to be in this position
kubejs.ponder.freezer.text_1: the item ports needs to be in this position, either input or output
kubejs.ponder.freezer.text_2: the fluid ports needs to be in this position, either input or output
kubejs.ponder.freezer.text_4: the power port needs to be in this position
